hint_odo: The number shown on your bike's dashboard right now
hint_distance: If you don't know the odometer reading, just enter how many km you rode since your last fill-up
register_mode_question: How do you want to track your ride?
register_mode_odo: I'll enter what the odometer shows
register_mode_distance: I know how many km I rode since last fill-up
tip_title: 💡 Tip: Do you know how fuel efficiency works?
tip_desc: Each time you log fuel, NAVE automatically calculates how many km your bike rides per liter.
tip_btn_how: How do I log a fill-up?
tip_how_explanation: To log a fill-up, select whether you want to enter Odometer reading or Distance ridden. Then enter the liters filled and click Save. That's it!
